mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, nickname, dept_id AS deptId, enabled, must_change_pwd AS mustChangePwd FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, nickname, dept_id AS deptId, enabled, must_change_pwd AS mustChangePwd FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT r.code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1
SELECT r.data_scope FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms <> ''
SELECT ur.role_id FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT r.name FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.id
SELECT up.post_id FROM sys_user_post up INNER JOIN sys_post p ON p.id = up.post_id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0
SELECT p.name FROM sys_post p INNER JOIN sys_user_post up ON up.post_id = p.id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.sort, p.id
mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.real_name, u.mobile, u.email, u.gender, u.avatar_file_id, u.dept_id, d.name AS dept_name, u.enabled
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON d.id = u.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
